_doc: Data we KNOW is required (an engine rule or feature needs it) but cannot find in the catalogs we hold — it must be sourced. Surfaced in the UI under Other > Data Sourcing Required. Add an entry here whenever a required data input can't be located in hand. Distinct from extraction_issues.json (which is for pages we HAVE but couldn't extract cleanly).

items.scope: Blum — all hinge series (CLIP top, CLIP top BLUMOTION, COMPACT)
items.needed_for: engine hinge-count derivation (ENGINE_V2_FIT.md §7 / R007) — how many hinges a door needs for a given height + weight
items.where: Blum manufacturer technical data (not in catalogs/ — only Würth distributor + Grass manufacturer catalogs are held)

items.scope: Salice — all hinge series (Series 700, Silentia, Air)
items.where: Salice manufacturer technical data (not in catalogs/)
